name: NiceJob
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What does NiceJob do?

NiceJob's review generator aims to streamline the process of building a strong online reputation by making it simple for businesses to gather, manage, and leverage customer reviews.

Source: G2

Features

  • Offers pre-written, tested SMS and email templates that can be personalized to fit the business’s branding and messaging.
  • Automatically sends SMS and email requests to customers after a purchase or service, ensuring timely feedback collection.
  • Facilitates review collection on multiple platforms including Google, Facebook, and other major review sites.
  • Automatically shares positive reviews on social media platforms to enhance online visibility and reputation.
  • A centralized hub where businesses can track, manage, and respond to reviews efficiently.
  • Provides detailed reports and insights on review performance, customer sentiment, and areas for improvement.

Benefits

  • The automated system generates four times more reviews compared to manual methods, significantly increasing feedback volume.
  • More reviews contribute to better search engine rankings, making the business more visible online.
  • Consistent, positive reviews build trust and credibility with potential customers.
  • Automates the review collection process, saving time and resources for business owners and staff.
  • Engages customers with personalized, timely review requests, fostering a sense of value and appreciation.

Pros

✅ Users say that it makes review acquistion much easier and faster

Cons

❌ Users say that it has limited features as compared to other softwares

‍

Priced at $75 Per Month
